creator: rink@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Michiel,

On Tue, Sep 16, 2008 at 04:55:14PM +0000, Michiel wrote:
> Boot machine with FreeBSD on USB stick.

This is a known issue - it should be fixed in the upcoming 7.1 release.
Can you try a recent 7-STABLE to confirm?

Thanks,

-- 
Rink P.W. Springer                                - http://rink.nu
"Anyway boys, this is America. Just because you get more votes doesn't
 mean you win." - Fox Mulder
